prompt:
Ultra-realistic candid smartphone flash photograph, portrait orientation, 3:4 aspect ratio. A young East Asian woman walking quickly along a quiet urban street at night beside a long white tiled wall. Captured in a spontaneous paparazzi-style moment as she suddenly notices the camera and instinctively raises her open hand directly toward the lens to block the shot. Her body remains turned forward while her head glances back over her shoulder, revealing a subtle playful smile and direct eye contact.
Strong on-camera flash creates bright foreground illumination, deep shadows, and a raw nightlife aesthetic. Motion blur is visible on the raised hand and strands of hair, enhancing the sense of movement and authenticity. She wears a sleek black sleeveless dress, thin-framed glasses, small earrings, and carries a glossy black shoulder bag. Wind lightly sweeps through her long dark hair.
Background features a dimly lit modern city street with distant streetlights, high-rise buildings, soft bokeh lights, and dark asphalt pavement. Composition is dynamic and slightly off-center, emphasizing the outstretched hand dominating the foreground. The image has a candid, unposed, late-night Tokyo street photography vibe, resembling an accidental snapshot captured during a fashionable evening walk. High detail, natural skin texture, realistic lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic urban atmosphere, authentic smartphone camera quality, documentary-style realism.
Keywords: candid flash photography, Tokyo nightlife, paparazzi aesthetic, hand blocking camera, spontaneous street portrait, motion blur, urban night scene, fashionable minimalism, raw authentic moment, cinematic realism.
